graph_metadata.cycle_policy: RELATES_TO-only cycles are permitted and reported; other cycles are reported for validation by the Validation Engine.
graph_metadata.inference: Only declared relationships and deterministic SUPERSEDES/SUPERSEDED_BY projections are represented.
graph_metadata.master_index_reachability: Every inventoried source document is cataloged by the generated master index.
